name: Fresh Tomato Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 tomatoes, medium size or 2 lb Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into wedges and place them in a 1 1/2-quart saucepan.
2. Add all ingredients except yogurt, stirring to combine.
3. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove tomato skins and seeds.
5. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper as needed.
6. Garnish bowls of soup with spoonfuls of yogurt before serving.
